'''ngakofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nycturia|nycturia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nycturia|nycturia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngakofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || ngækefeth || ngækefej || ngækefesh || ngækefe
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || ngakokofoth || ngakokofoj || ngakokofosh || ngakokofo
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || ngakofoth || ngakofoj || ngakofosh || ngakofo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || ngakoffofth || ngakoffofj || ngakoffofsh || ngakoffof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || ngakofotho || ngakofojo || ngakofosho || ngakofoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || ngakofoth || ngakofoj || ngakofosh || ngakofo
|-
| [[Possessive]] || ngakofothol || ngakofojol || ngakofoshol || ngakofokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || ngakofoothotho || ngakofoojojo || ngakofooshosho || ngakofooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || ngakofothon || ngakofojon || ngakofoshon || ngakofokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || ngakofothooro || ngakofojooro || ngakofoshooro || ngakofokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
